subject: refactor(types): tighten two loose casts from ship/types trigger
body:
T1 — src/debug/debugLog.ts:291. The Safari-standalone check used a
looser cast than the same check in PwaDiagnosticsTab.tsx:133 and
usePWAInstall.ts:100. All three check `navigator.standalone === true`;
the other two used `Navigator & { standalone?: boolean }`, but
debugLog used `unknown as Record<string, unknown>` which types
`standalone` as `unknown` and relies on `=== true` coincidence.
Aligned with the established pattern.

T2 — src/hooks/usePWAInstall.ts:69. The window-capture consumer used
a double-loose cast (`unknown as Record<string, unknown>` + downstream
`as BeforeInstallPromptEvent | undefined` on each property). Replaced
with a single shape-specific cast:
    Window & {
      __pwaInstallPromptEvent?: BeforeInstallPromptEvent;
      __deferredInstallPrompt?: BeforeInstallPromptEvent;
    }
Both downstream assertions removed — properties are now typed
directly. Consistent with the `Window & { … }` pattern used on lines
90 and 100 of the same file.

Skipped: T3 (usePWAUpdate.ts:152 `_registration!.installing` non-null
assertion) — pre-existing, idiomatic, not touched by this branch.
CLAUDE.md prohibits "while I'm here" changes without asking.

Clean findings: zero `as any`, zero `@ts-ignore`, zero bare `any` in
production code across the whole codebase.

tsc 0, jest 89/89, expo web build clean.

Tags: debug, refactor, types
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-pill-hardening
